tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, elevated serum creatinine, and proteinuria, suggesting possible renal impairment. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal odor, high protein, glucose, and ketones) indicate significant renal dysfunction and possible metabolic derangement, but no evidence of urinary tract infection. Further nephrological and metabolic evaluation is recommended.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
